audit_meta.determinism_notes: Evidence-only audit using repository-visible code, contracts, and deterministic command outputs.

commands.reason: ImportError: local pydantic package shadows FastAPI dependency expectation during collection

ranked_priorities.reason: Highest lineage break risk across downstream validator and synthesis surfaces.
Execution spine is available but remains projection-heavy and weakly linked.
Static allowlist + fallback core binding caps runtime closure.
Deterministic review can overstate certainty when upstream is synthetic.

subsystems.missing_closure_element: Downstream consumption + non-placeholder linkage propagation for ERS artifacts.
subsystems.short_reason: Governance APIs are live, but ERS remains static and operator-triggered with placeholder linkage fields.
strongest_evidence: webpanel/routes/governance_routes.py:166-182 registers ingest/ack/defer/session routes
webpanel/operator_console.py:8100-8102 constrains ERS to static catalog + explicit operator trigger
webpanel/operator_console.py:219-221 ERS artifact export writes empty linkage arrays
subsystems.user_impact: Control surface is usable; ERS closure confidence is still manual and shallow.

subsystems.missing_closure_element: Removal of MVP fallback path or explicit promotion criteria for core bridge binding.
subsystems.short_reason: Runtime invocation is deterministic and gated, but built around fallback core wiring and static allowlists.
strongest_evidence: webpanel/core_bridge.py:11-16 and 102-109 external core fallback behavior
webpanel/core_bridge.py:143 mvp risk-note explicitly marks structural interim state
webpanel/operator_console.py:8106 static allowlisted runtime corridor registry
subsystems.user_impact: Unsupported runtime paths collapse to fallback semantics, reducing predictability of edge behavior.

subsystems.missing_closure_element: Callable map stage + populated ledger/correlation linkage in pipeline envelope.
subsystems.short_reason: Pipeline runs end-to-end, but parse/map/diff are projection-driven and linkage remains empty in produced envelope.
strongest_evidence: webpanel/operator_console.py:8109 pipeline path rule states map can remain NOT_COMPUTABLE
webpanel/operator_console.py:2268-2308 map projection synthesizes relation pairs from parsed keys/run tokens
webpanel/operator_console.py:2582-2586 and 2637-2639 linkage arrays are emitted empty
subsystems.user_impact: Pipeline status appears complete while lineage and semantic mapping remain weak.

subsystems.missing_closure_element: Final-state confidence binding to non-projection parse/map evidence.
subsystems.short_reason: Review/final-state logic is deterministic, but inherits projection constraints from upstream pipeline stages.
strongest_evidence: webpanel/operator_console.py:2338-2401 deterministic final-result classifier
webpanel/operator_console.py:8111-8112 hardening audit + selection rules are deterministic
webpanel/operator_console.py:2435-2464 parse/map step records sourced from projection functions
subsystems.user_impact: Review surfaces can look closure-grade when upstream evidence is synthetic.

subsystems.missing_closure_element: Uniform linkage completeness across binding/context artifacts instead of selective repair behavior.
subsystems.short_reason: Binding/context repair exists, but broader artifact ecosystem still depends on empty linkage and fallback materialization.
strongest_evidence: webpanel/operator_console.py:773-805 resultspack fallback used when canonical artifact files are absent
webpanel/operator_console.py:797 uses RUNE.AUDIT for fallback binding surface
webpanel/operator_console.py:8133-8137 binding/context restoration rules remain projection-driven
subsystems.user_impact: Some runs restore context, but lineage consistency is not guaranteed across surfaces.

subsystems.missing_closure_element: Detector feed from authoritative telemetry and richer linkage context.
subsystems.short_reason: Detector logic is deterministic but bounded to derived counts from operator surfaces with explicit placeholder linkage.
strongest_evidence: webpanel/operator_console.py:8119-8126 detector ladder rules are deterministic
webpanel/operator_console.py:8120 detector export rule keeps explicit linkage placeholders
webpanel/operator_console.py:2458-2462 upstream map stage can produce NOT_COMPUTABLE
subsystems.user_impact: Detector outputs are stable for triage but not closure-grade for deep confidence decisions.

subsystems.missing_closure_element: Upstream closure of detector and pipeline linkage quality feeding fusion/synthesis.
subsystems.short_reason: Fusion/synthesis precedence ladders are deterministic, yet they compose upstream partial detector/pipeline evidence.
strongest_evidence: webpanel/operator_console.py:8127-8132 fusion/synthesis deterministic rules
webpanel/operator_console.py:8127 fusion input constrained to projected detector outputs
webpanel/operator_console.py:8099 reporting/viz stack consumes summaries rather than raw execution chains
subsystems.user_impact: Synthesis guidance is legible but can understate hidden uncertainty.

subsystems.missing_closure_element: Validator/ledger consumption contract for generated reporting artifacts.
subsystems.short_reason: Reporting/export routes and writers are operational, but generated artifacts are mostly terminal summaries, not enforced inputs.
strongest_evidence: webpanel/routes/export_routes.py:14-36 bundle export is executable and deterministic
webpanel/operator_console.py:8099 reporting_rule defines bounded summary behavior
webpanel/operator_console.py:293-299 and 192-197 write bounded report artifacts
subsystems.user_impact: Exports are useful and reproducible, but not guaranteed to close feedback loops.

subsystems.missing_closure_element: Unified render contract consuming full run artifacts and returning richer bound visual state.
subsystems.short_reason: Viz render is deterministic and mode-routed but explicitly lightweight (non-heavy-chart) text projection.
strongest_evidence: webpanel/operator_console.py:8098 viz_render_rule explicitly says no heavy charting
webpanel/operator_console.py:131-156 render artifact captures routed preview payload
tests/test_viz_resolve.py:1-14 indicates richer viz resolution lives in separate runtime path
subsystems.user_impact: Good orientation layer; insufficient for closure-grade visual diagnostics.

subsystems.missing_closure_element: Registry alignment for emitted rune_ids (or explicit deprecation path).
subsystems.short_reason: Artifact rune IDs and registry are out of alignment, creating contract-authority drift.
strongest_evidence: aal_core/runes/catalog.v0.yaml:4-69 registers only INGEST/SCAN/PARSE/MAP/DIFF/ERS
webpanel/operator_console.py:2228-2232 pipeline catalog uses RUNE.AUDIT
webpanel/operator_console.py:797 and 2232 and 2570 references emit/use RUNE.AUDIT outside registry
subsystems.user_impact: Governance and validator surfaces cannot treat rune identity as single-source-of-truth.
